metadata.title: Bonay Santiago — Software Engineer
metadata.description: Software engineer specialized in AI-powered enterprise solutions, full-stack development and data engineering.

hero.name: Bonay Santiago
hero.tagline: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of AI and enterprise software.

about.title: About
about.description: As AI Technical Lead at EDISA, I bring 14+ years of experience in enterprise software development, with the last 3+ years leading AI/ML initiatives. My work centers on integrating AI capabilities into the Libra ERP system — from LLM-powered features and RAG pipelines to multi-agent architectures — serving businesses across Spain, Colombia, Ecuador, and the Dominican Republic.
about.focus: Currently focused on production LLM systems, RAG architectures, multi-agent orchestration, and bringing cutting-edge AI into traditional enterprise systems.

cpm.title: CPM Agent Accelerator
cpm.description: Multi-agent AI platform for Corporate Performance Management. Automated consolidation review and performance analysis with real-time workflow orchestration, DAG execution, and executive narrative generation.
cpm.highlights: 9 specialized AI agents · Real-time SSE streaming · 3 languages (EN/ES/JA)

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's connect
contact.description: Interested in collaboration or want access to a live demo? Reach out through any of these channels.
contact.demoAccess: For demo access to my projects, please mention the project name in your message.
